name: meta
description: Meta plugin for the learn-yy-skills marketplace: three skills — plugin-dev (a prescriptive guide to building a great skills marketplace: repo layout, Claude + Codex dual manifests, version discipline, what makes a plugin/skill worth installing), skill-authoring (how to write, structure, and review Agent Skills that reliably trigger and stay lean), and session-retro (reflect on a just-completed session and turn the friction into concrete skill improvements).
